channel.title: The Red Canoe · Live Dispatches
channel.description: Satellite messages from Violette and Stan — La Vérendrye canoe expedition, July 2026.

item.title: We finished today Saturday. One day ahead of schedule. We are both bitten to death by the mosquitoes. We are happy and a proud of our achievements. This loop is · 📍 45.7381, -73.9915
item.description: We finished today Saturday. One day ahead of schedule. We are both bitten to death by the mosquitoes. We are happy and a proud of our achievements. This loop is marked « advanced » which it is. The canoeing can be challenging, the portages hard. It is remote so no one will come to save you (unless you have a Garmin inreach). · 📍 45.7381, -73.9915

item.title: 2/2 wake up to the smell of breakfast. Happy dad. · 📍 47.7048, -77.1289
item.description: 2/2 wake up to the smell of breakfast. Happy dad. · 📍 47.7048, -77.1289

item.title: 1/2 Saturday. 4th and last day. We went quiet fast. Violette is strong, willing amazing. I feel so grateful living this adventure with her this morning I · 📍 47.7048, -77.1289
item.description: 1/2 Saturday. 4th and last day. We went quiet fast. Violette is strong, willing amazing. I feel so grateful living this adventure with her this morning I · 📍 47.7048, -77.1289

item.title: 2/2 fallen trees and boulders during 9 portages. At night we slept on a camp on a small island in the middle of a lack · 📍 47.7048, -77.1289
item.description: 2/2 fallen trees and boulders during 9 portages. At night we slept on a camp on a small island in the middle of a lack · 📍 47.7048, -77.1289

item.title: 1/2 Yesterday 3rd day was sunny. Mostly with current in our direction. We saw from a white sand beach. Felt soooo good. We portage the canoe up hill. Above · 📍 47.7048, -77.1289
item.description: 1/2 Yesterday 3rd day was sunny. Mostly with current in our direction. We saw from a white sand beach. Felt soooo good. We portage the canoe up hill. Above · 📍 47.7048, -77.1289

item.title: 2/2 day ahead. Making good time. (I think). · 📍 47.7277, -77.0440
item.description: 2/2 day ahead. Making good time. (I think). · 📍 47.7277, -77.0440

item.title: 1/2 Starting 2nd day. Yesterday was tonight stream infested w/ mosquitos. Tons of pushing the canoe in shallow waters and some rain. Today the sun shine. Long · 📍 47.7277, -77.0440
item.description: 1/2 Starting 2nd day. Yesterday was tonight stream infested w/ mosquitos. Tons of pushing the canoe in shallow waters and some rain. Today the sun shine. Long · 📍 47.7277, -77.0440

item.title: 2/2 Changed into dry clothes, eat and ready for a good night. Tonight the sun came back in an amazing sunset. · 📍 47.8183, -77.0816
item.description: 2/2 Changed into dry clothes, eat and ready for a good night. Tonight the sun came back in an amazing sunset. · 📍 47.8183, -77.0816

item.title: 1/2 It is so wild, immense, beautiful. First day mix of rivers, streams, lacs. Sun, wind (back) and rain. Arrived at camp drenched. Set up bug net and tarp. · 📍 47.8183, -77.0816
item.description: 1/2 It is so wild, immense, beautiful. First day mix of rivers, streams, lacs. Sun, wind (back) and rain. Arrived at camp drenched. Set up bug net and tarp. · 📍 47.8183, -77.0816

item.title: Made it to Montreal, picked up Violette, and now driving to our first camp 2 hours northwest of Montreal. · 📍 45.5289, -73.5788
item.description: Made it to Montreal, picked up Violette, and now driving to our first camp 2 hours northwest of Montreal. · 📍 45.5289, -73.5788

item.title: In the Adirondack less than 2hrs from Montreal. Left the rain behind. · 📍 44.0140, -73.7050
item.description: In the Adirondack less than 2hrs from Montreal. Left the rain behind. · 📍 44.0140, -73.7050

item.title: The canoe is safely secured on the car, and we are ready to hit the road. · 📍 40.3658, -74.6367
item.description: The canoe is safely secured on the car, and we are ready to hit the road. · 📍 40.3658, -74.6367

item.title: We are taking the road on Tuesday! · 📍 40.3658, -74.6372
item.description: We are taking the road on Tuesday! · 📍 40.3658, -74.6372
